intended_use: The Sight OLO is a quantitative multi-parameter automated hematology analyzer intended for in vitro diagnostic use in screening capillary or venous whole blood samples collected in K2EDTA blood collec
intended_use_full: The Sight OLO is a quantitative multi-parameter automated hematology analyzer intended for in vitro diagnostic use in screening capillary or venous whole blood samples collected in K2EDTA blood collection tubes, or fingertip samples collected using the Sight OLO test kit micro-capillary tubes. When used with the Sight OLO cartridge, the Sight OLO enumerates the following CBC parameters in whole blood: WBC, RBC, HGB, HCT, MCV, MCH, MCHC, RDW, PLT, NEUT%/#, LYMPH %/#, MONO %/#, EOS%/#, and BASO%/#. The Sight OLO is indicated for use in clinical laboratories to identify and classify one or more of the formed elements of blood in children 3 months and above, adolescents and adults.
target_condition: Blood disorders requiring complete blood count analysis; screening for abnormalities in formed blood elements
ground_truth: Sysmex XN-Series (XN-10, XN-20) Automated Hematology Analyzer (predicate device); manual light microscopy for flagging study (208 samples)
other_metrics: Correlation coefficients (r) ranging from 0.6412 to 0.9973 across measurands; bias and slope metrics reported for all 19 CBC parameters; coefficient of variation (CV) for repeatability ranging from 0.7% to 90.1% depending on measurand and concentration level; reproducibility data including within-run, between-run, between-day, between-instrument, and between-site precision components; limit of blank (LoB), limit of detection (LoD), and limit of quantitation (LoQ) established for WBC, PLT, and HGB
